rationale: Abstract X explicitly identifies the knowledge gap as uncharacterized outcomes of TTVR with a jailed transvalvular lead and calibrates its conclusion more appropriately to registry-level observational evidence, whereas Y omits a clear gap statement and overstates certainty by prescribing management requirements from a single observational registry.
loser_weakness: Abstract Y lacked a specific falsifiable knowledge-gap statement in the background and drew stronger clinical directives in the conclusion than the observational registry design supports.
